placeholder.categoryBrand: Manage product categories and brands to organize your catalog efficiently.
placeholder.inventoryAlert: Monitor inventory levels and set up alerts to prevent stockouts.
placeholder.productAnalysis: Analyze product performance metrics including views, conversions, and ratings.
placeholder.orderProcessing: View and process customer orders, manage order status and fulfillment.
placeholder.afterSales: Handle returns, refunds, and customer complaints with efficient after-sales service.
placeholder.logistics: Manage shipping methods, track deliveries, and configure logistics partners.
placeholder.invoice: Issue and manage invoices for customer orders.
placeholder.storeDecoration: Customize your store appearance, layout, and branding to attract customers.
placeholder.dataDashboard: View comprehensive analytics and data insights for your store performance.
placeholder.customerManagement: Manage customer profiles, segments, and communication preferences.
placeholder.promotion: Create and manage promotional campaigns, coupons, and flash sales.
placeholder.advertising: Set up and manage advertising campaigns across different channels.
placeholder.contentDistribution: Manage content marketing and distribution partnerships.
placeholder.settlement: Track financial settlements, payouts, and transaction records.
placeholder.costProfit: Analyze costs, revenue streams, and profit margins.
placeholder.accountPermission: Manage team accounts, roles, and access permissions.
placeholder.appService: Discover and install third-party apps and services to extend functionality.
